title: cynorkis papilio
intro: Cynorkis papilio, also known as the "Butterfly Orchid", is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit antimicrobial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Cynorkis papilio include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. In traditional herbal medicine, Cynorkis papilio is prepared in various ways, including infusion, decoction, and tincture, to be used in treating the mentioned health conditions.
